name: space_law_water_allocation_model_marrowbridge_st_lt
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Space Law, the situation tagged internally around space law water allocation model marrowbridge st lt has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Marco Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Marco Vasquez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Space Law. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Dubois
agents.identity: I am Ravi Dubois, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Space Law. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Marco Vasquez must choose under short term versus long term. What does Marco Vasquez do?
